accurate.why: All claims match the bill text; correctly describes the amendment and its operational requirements.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all content traces to the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the purpose is amending the Federal Oil and Gas Royalty Management Act to improve royalty management.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly notes the amendment to the 1982 Act.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the Indian lands exclusion and the interest waiver condition.

effective_dates.why: Notes September 20, 2024 as the effective date.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all key provisions including the 120-day deadline, interim payment rules, correction window, and interest waiver.

concise.why: Appropriately concise for the bill's complexity.

correct_entities.why: Federal Oil and Gas Royalty Management Act of 1982 and Secretary correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: 120-day deadline and third-month correction window are accurate.
